scripts.db:bootstrap: rm -rf .tmp/db-bootstrap && tsc --pretty false --noEmit false --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/db-bootstrap scripts/db/bootstrap.ts && node .tmp/db-bootstrap/scripts/db/bootstrap.js
scripts.test:contracts: rm -rf .tmp/contract-tests && tsc --pretty false --noEmit false --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp/contract-tests tests/contracts.test.ts lib/contracts/apiContracts.ts && node --test .tmp/contract-tests/tests/contracts.test.js
scripts.test:validation: rm -rf .tmp/validation-tests && tsc --pretty false --noEmit false --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp/validation-tests tests/trading-validation.test.ts lib/validation/trading.ts lib/contracts/apiContracts.ts && node --test .tmp/validation-tests/tests/trading-validation.test.js
scripts.test:integration: rm -rf .tmp/integration-tests && tsc --pretty false --noEmit false --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp/integration-tests tests/integration-e2e.test.ts app/api/auth/register/route.ts app/api/auth/login/route.ts app/api/auth/me/route.ts app/api/auth/logout/route.ts app/api/agent/route.ts app/api/execution/route.ts app/api/bitso/order/route.ts lib/services/executionService.ts lib/services/riskValidationService.ts lib/auth.ts lib/contracts/apiContracts.ts lib/validation/trading.ts lib/config/runtime.ts && node --test .tmp/integration-tests/tests/integration-e2e.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:validation && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: rm -rf .tmp/validation-tests && tsc --pretty false --noEmit false --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp/validation-tests tests/contracts.test.ts tests/trading-validation.test.ts lib/validation/trading.ts lib/contracts/apiContracts.ts && node --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=85 --test-coverage-functions=85 --test-coverage-branches=75 --test .tmp/validation-tests/tests/contracts.test.js .tmp/validation-tests/tests/trading-validation.test.js
